DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-15-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ("CCSF") IS GRANTED. CCSF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS (SET ONE) NOS. 1 - 12 TO PLAINTIFF DE'JANAE MALONE-MCFARLAND ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT PVESTAL@NVLAWLLP.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VESTAL; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-21-2021 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WAS HEARD. RAYMOND ROLLAN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COUNSEL INDICATED TO THE COURT THAT HE INTENDED TO GET ON FILE A CCP 998 OFFER, WHICH WAS SIGNED BY THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT TOOK DEFENDANT'S MOTION OFF CALENDAR AND INDICATED THAT THE CASE MAY BE PLACED ON A CRC DISMISSAL CALENDAR FOR 04/20/21 AT 10:30AM IN DEPT. 610 DEPENDING ON THE DOCUMENT GETTING FILED WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Motion of defendant City and County of San Francisco ("CCSF") is GRANTED. CCSF's Requests for Admissions (Set One) Nos. 1 - 12 to plaintiff De'Janae Malone-McFarland are deemed admitted.

Prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at pvestal@nvlawllp.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jul-23-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Brian L. Larsen's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF DE'JANAE MALONE-MCFARLAND: Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order on the mandatory Judicial Council form which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
